subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth the truth, drawing the people nearer unto His straight Path; through it the fragrance of the Manifestation hath been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق بما یقرب الناس الی صراطه المستقیم به فاح عرف الظهور و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant
